name: Cloak of Eerie Trepidation
description: Notes This is a halloween reskinned version of the extremely rare UT Cloak of Bloody Surprises.
effects: Effect on Self: SPD Decrease (-40 SPD) for 3 seconds, ATT Boost (+30 ATT) for 3 seconds Sneak: Invisible for 5 seconds. After 1 second can be canceled by shooting. On Invisible end: Lethal Strike: Your weapon deals 150 (+0 per ATT > 55) and 35% (+2% per ATT > 55) of target’s defense as additional damage for 3 seconds
